source: compound-finance/comet deployments/<network>/<market>/roots.json (Comet proxies + Bulker + CometRewards) + on-chain rewardConfig() verification (CometRewards)
note: Compound v3 (Comet) contract inventory. 28 Comet markets across 10 chains (cover, existing per-market coverage). CometRewards mainnet cover (claim/claimTo); MainnetBulker cover (invoke -> parallel_tagged_dispatch). Comet Configurator/CometFactory/price feeds/governance are protocol infra/admin, excluded as a class (not user pre-sign surface). Multichain Bulker/Rewards: decode follow-up.

contracts.name: CometRewards (mainnet)
contracts.reason: COMP reward claim: claim/claimTo. On-chain rewardConfig() confirms COMP token + rescale. Mainnet surface-gated; other chains decode-deferred (multichain follow-up).

contracts.name: MainnetBulker (mainnet)
contracts.reason: user batch entrypoint: invoke(bytes32[] actions, bytes[] data) decoded by the parallel_tagged_dispatch emit strategy into a Multicall of per-action bodies (8 ACTION_* tags: supply/withdraw/transfer/claim + native/stETH variants). See bulker.coverage.json. Address from compound-finance/comet deployments mainnet roots.json (Etherscan-verified MainnetBulker).
